title: Longest Semi-Repeating Subarray
Find Books with Polarized Opinions
solution:
SELECT DISTINCT b.book_id, b.title
FROM Books b
JOIN Ratings r ON b.book_id = r.book_id
GROUP BY b.book_id, b.title
HAVING MIN(r.rating) <= 2 AND MAX(r.rating) >= 4;

title: Earliest Finish Time for Land and Water Rides I
Maximum Weight in Two Bags
Find Stores with Inventory Imbalance
solution:
SELECT store_id,
       MAX(quantity) - MIN(quantity) AS imbalance
FROM Inventory
GROUP BY store_id
HAVING imbalance > 100;

solution: SELECT student_id, study_date, hours_studied\nFROM StudyRecords\nORDER BY student_id, study_date;

Find Overbooked Employees
solution:
SELECT employee_id
FROM meetings
GROUP BY employee_id, meeting_date
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

title: Split Array by Prime Indices
Coupon Code Validator
Find Drivers with Improved Fuel Efficiency
solution:
SELECT driver_id
FROM trips
GROUP BY driver_id
HAVING AVG(CASE WHEN trip_date < '2024-01-01' THEN fuel_efficiency END) <
       AVG(CASE WHEN trip_date >= '2024-01-01' THEN fuel_efficiency END);

title: Number of Integers With Popcount-Depth Equal to K I
Minimum Time to Activate String
Find COVID Recovery Patients
solution:
SELECT patient_id
FROM patients
GROUP BY patient_id
HAVING MAX(status = 'Recovered') = 1
   AND MAX(status = 'COVID') = 1;

solution:

FROM performance_reviews
GROUP BY employee_id

AND MIN(score) < MAX(score);

solution:
SELECT book_id
FROM library_books
GROUP BY book_id
HAVING SUM(available_copies) = 0;

Find Product Recommendation Pairs
solution:
SELECT a.product_id, b.product_id
FROM ProductPurchases a
JOIN ProductPurchases b
ON a.user_id = b.user_id
AND a.product_id < b.product_id
GROUP BY a.product_id, b.product_id;

title: Count the Number of Computer Unlocking Permutations
Find Category Recommendation Pairs
solution:
SELECT a.category_id AS category1, b.category_id AS category2, COUNT(*) AS pair_count
FROM UserCategories a
JOIN UserCategories b
ON a.user_id = b.user_id AND a.category_id < b.category_id
GROUP BY a.category_id, b.category_id
ORDER BY pair_count DESC;
